# Daniel Gaszczyk

> Tech entrepreneur and AI consultant. Co-founder of TeamFeedback (~1M PLN in EU funding). 5+ years building products at the intersection of AI and business, with a focus on practical AI implementations for small and mid-sized businesses (SMEs) in Poland.

Microsoft Azure AI certified. Based in Poland. Working language: Polish and English.

## Core work

- [Portfolio (Polish)](https://danielgaszczyk.com/pl): Main site in Polish, with full project list, bio, and contact details.
- [Portfolio (English)](https://danielgaszczyk.com/en): Same site in English.
- [Projects](https://danielgaszczyk.com/pl/projects): Complete list of shipped products and consulting engagements.
- [About](https://danielgaszczyk.com/pl/about): Background, philosophy, and skills.
- [Contact](https://danielgaszczyk.com/pl/contact): Email and booking calendar.

## Key projects

- **TeamFeedback** — AI-powered 360-degree feedback, employee assessment, and engagement survey platform. Secured around 1 million PLN in EU funding. ISO 27001 certified. Site: https://teamfeedback.co
- **DailySpark** — daily personal-development product leveraging AI for habit and learning loops.
- **AI consulting (wytlumacz.com)** — implementation audits, PoCs, and full AI rollouts for SMEs. Typical ROI window: 3–6 months.

## Focus areas

- Practical AI implementations (not hype-driven) for SMEs
- Business process automation with AI agents
- Voice AI and conversational interfaces
- AI-assisted software development
- Digital transformation advisory

## Who this is for

- Polish SMEs evaluating AI implementation
- Founders looking for a technical co-founder or fractional CTO
- Organizations that want an independent AI audit before committing to vendors
